claim_bullets.bullet_text: Recursion is the root of computation since it trades description for time—Alan Perlis (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.109-125) (may).
Consists of an element concatenated with a list (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.109-125) (might).
We can express that using a spread (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.109-125) (possible).

source_record_text: Chapter discusses self‑similar data structures, recursion, and tail‑call optimization in JavaScript.
